---
title: "DANA 4820 Project Part 1"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

**Course: DANA 4820**

**Team members: Nandini Bhatia, Diego Alberto, Khushpreet Kaur, Haruka Sawakami**

# Part (a)
## Summary of the Beyond Multiple Linear Regression, Chapter 4

## Chapter 4.1

## Chapter 4.2
### Chapter 4.2.1
### Chapter 4.2.2
## Chapter 4.3

## Chapter 4.4
### Chapter 4.4.1
### Chapter 4.4.2
### Chapter 4.4.3
### Chapter 4.4.4
### Chapter 4.4.5
### Chapter 4.4.6
### Chapter 4.4.7
